code_quality.notes: 12 files >400 lines, 4 god components (>10 useState/useRef). No dead exports, no 'as any', no TODO/FIXME. All large refactors deferred.

security.notes: No XSS vectors, no eval, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML. localStorage only stores UI state. URLs use encodeURIComponent.

performance.notes: Added React.memo to 4 large unmemoized components: GraphTemplatePanel, MapComparisonPanel, ChangeHistoryPanel, PresentationMode
